**SULEMAN EHSIN ICT Engineer | LC / ELV Systems | ISP | OSP | Security Systems | Design & Supervision

Phone** : +966-502257052 **Email** : Suleman.ehsin@gmail.com **Address** : Riyadh, Saudi Arabia **SEC** : 1097934 **LinkedIn** : www.linkedin.com/in/suleman-ehsin-23258795

## SUMMARY

ICT Engineer with 11+ years of experience in FTTx, ELV, ITS, and smart infrastructure projects. Involved in design, supervision, coordination, and site execution across infrastructure and building systems. Experienced in supporting end-to-end project delivery from design stage through installation, testing, commissioning, and handover. Worked closely with consultants, contractors, and vendors to ensure compliance with authority standards and alignment between design and site execution. Focused on delivering practical engineering solutions with consistent quality and timely completion.

- FTTx, ELV & ITS Systems
- Smart Infrastructure & ICT Networks

- Operations & Maintenance Support

- Integrated smart systems such as weather stations, irrigation controllers, and IoT-based monitoring solutions.
